name_en: Burgundy🔮🔮🔮🚩🚩🚩Calfskin CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains interprets an effortless sense of luxury. In fashion rules, the word "wanderer" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casualness and luxury. Design Highlights: Unconventional elegance, crafted from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain ⛓️ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather intertwined strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype of niche bags being impractical. Whether it's daily essentials or small items, it can be easily stored. Style Matching: The perfect companion from casual to formal 👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or a little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiting, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving the charm of this design transcends gender boundaries. Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm
